name: synapse-ocr-server
description: Local OCR service implementing the Synapse /v1/ocr/pages contract. Offline Tesseract baseline + optional vision-LLM engine for high-quality Greek (printed & handwritten) recognition.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/ocr.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/engines/tesseract.js && node --check src/engines/visionLlm.js && node --check src/util/images.js
